This is reflected in my work as a social worker, where I often organize my schedule and prepare for client visits, meetings, and community events in advance. I also incorporate mindfulness and self-care into my routine, which helps me avoid the stress of last-minute work. While I can be flexible when needed, I generally value the peace of mind that comes with early completion.
